summary: This document outlines a Clinical Risk Management System (CRMS) template designed to ensure healthcare IT safety within the organization. It defines key roles such as the Clinical Safety Officer and CEO, and establishes governance frameworks aligned with NHS Digital standards like DCB0129 and DCB0160. The policy details the processes for risk management, audit, and compliance regarding patient safety in IT systems.
